name: Modulus
tagline: Editorial-industrial Shopify theme for considered brands.
summary: Modulus pairs sharp editorial typography with an industrial grid system — ideal for design studios, small-batch makers, and brands that want product pages to read like a magazine spread. 28+ native sections, two install presets (Editorial and Industrial), and full customer-account coverage ship out of the box.
description: Modulus is a production-grade Shopify theme built for brands that treat their catalogue as content. The theme covers the full commerce surface — homepage, collection, product, search, blog, article, cart, customer accounts, contact, gift card — with 28 custom sections, a cart drawer, predictive search overlay, and a sticky header with transparent-over-hero mode. Two Theme Store presets (Modulus Editorial — light, airy, portrait cards; Modulus Industrial — dark, square cards, vendor-forward) let merchants pick an aesthetic in one click.
features: Accessibility — skip link, semantic landmarks, focus states
_notes: Fields are based on the structure Shopify requires for Theme Store listings as of 2026-04. Confirm against the current spec before submission: check https://shopify.dev/themes and https://partners.shopify.com for the exact category/industry slug vocabulary. Update the tagline + summary + description once you have a live preview URL and production copy.
